---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in MultiNavigator
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: multiAppDev
---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What did you expect to happen?

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened?

## Screenshots or Videos
If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain the problem.

## Environment
- **MultiNavigator version:** (e.g. 7.0.0)
- **Windows version:** (e.g. Windows 11 24H2)
- **WebView2 version:** (visible in About window)

## Additional Context
Any other information that might be relevant to the issue.
